privileged_info_summary: The task requires users to export 3 oldest legal references from a Jurism library. The required items are Marbury v. Madison (1803), The Path of the Law by Holmes (1897 Harvard Law Review article), and Brown v. Board of Education (1954). The forbidden items that must be excluded are Obergefell v. Hodges (2015), Tinker v. Des Moines (1969), and Miranda v. Arizona (1966). The data is synthetic but based on real, publicly documented US Supreme Court cases and law review articles. The expected output is a CSV file named 'oldest_precedents.csv' saved to '/home/ga/Documents/'.
